topic: Creating and Managing Earning and Deduction Heads
summary: This functionality allows you to create new earning or deduction heads (e.g., allowances, specific deductions) that are not pre-defined in the system, making them available for use in salary templates and processed salaries.
steps: To manage Earning Heads: Click on 'Earning Heads'. You can select existing heads by ticking them or click 'Add New' to create a new one. Enter the 'Name' for the new head and click 'Save'.
To manage Deduction Heads: Click on 'Deduction Heads'. Similar to earning heads, you can select existing ones or click 'Add New', enter the 'Name', and click 'Save'.
business_rules: Any new earning or deduction head created must be saved to be available in the system.
important_notes: These newly created heads can then be utilized when assigning salary templates to employees or when making ad-hoc edits to processed monthly salaries.
Creating a new head here only makes it available; it does not automatically apply it to existing employee contracts.
questions: How do I add a new allowance type to the ERP system?
Where can I define custom deduction types for payroll?
Can I activate existing earning heads without creating new ones?
What is the purpose of the Payroll Master in HRM Setup?
How do I ensure a newly created head is saved?
